contextBlurb: Quebec is advancing Bill 20, an Act to enact the Act to facilitate access to housing, which establishes a centralized application portal (guichet) for affordable and low-rental housing allocation. The province faces a rental vacancy rate of only 1.3% as of 2023, driving legislative and budgetary action. Existing programs such as the Programme d'habitation abordable Québec and subsidized HLM housing continue to operate alongside these new measures.

legislation.title: Subsidized Housing Program (Low-Rental Housing / HLM)
legislation.summary: Provincial program allowing low-income households to pay rent equal to 25% of their income through low-rental housing (HLM) units administered by the Société d'habitation du Québec.

legislation.title: Règles relatives au bail résidentiel — Tribunal administratif du logement
legislation.summary: Requires use of the Tribunal administratif du logement standard lease form for all new residential leases, including rooms, apartments, and houses, with mandatory spousal consent for family residences.

legislation.title: Programme d'aides financières pour le logement
legislation.summary: Financial assistance framework for low-income households and those with specific housing needs, administered through the Société d'habitation du Québec.

legislation.title: Programme d'habitation abordable Québec — Volet 3 : Initiative de multilogements hautement préfabriqués
legislation.summary: Government program supporting the construction of affordable multi-unit housing using highly prefabricated methods; a second call for projects closed November 14, 2025.

legislation.title: Loi édictant la Loi visant à favoriser l'accès au logement et modifiant diverses dispositions
legislation.summary: Establishes a centralized rental application portal (guichet) for affordable and low-rental housing, and sets rules governing the allocation and leasing of dwellings in affordable housing.

legislation.title: An Act to enact the Act to facilitate access to housing and to amend various provisions
legislation.summary: English version of Projet de loi n° 20; establishes rules for allocation and leasing of affordable housing dwellings and allows the filing of applications through a centralized portal.

legislation.title: Analyse d'impact réglementaire du projet de loi édictant la Loi visant à favoriser l'accès au logement
legislation.summary: Regulatory impact analysis laying the groundwork for the centralized housing application portal (guichet) for low-rental and affordable housing units in Quebec.

legislation.title: Projet de loi édictant la Loi visant à favoriser l'accès au logement et modifiant diverses dispositions — Mémoire au Conseil des ministres
legislation.summary: Council of Ministers memorandum detailing regulatory modifications required to implement the centralized housing portal, including eligibility conditions for affordable and low-rental housing.
